requirement_topic.en: EMC and disturbance performance under SASO-adopted requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SASO采纳条款下的电磁兼容与骚扰性能
requirement_topic.zht: SASO採納條款下的電磁相容與擾動性能

summary.en: For electrotechnical power tools, Saudi market acceptance often requires EMC evidence under SASO technical controls, and those routes can reference IEC 61000-series behavior through the IECEE pathway with Saudi national differences. Importers should ensure tested product configuration, cord length, switching mode, and control electronics are reflected in the dossier.
summary.zh: 对电动工具这类电气电子产品，沙特市场常要求符合SASO技术控制下的电磁兼容要求，并可通过IECEE路径结合沙特国家差异引用IEC 61000系列行为指标。进口商应确保测试配置、电源线长度、开关方式和控制电子部件均在资料中体现。
summary.zht: 對電動工具此類電氣電子產品，沙特市場常要求符合SASO技術控制下的電磁相容要求，並可透過IECEE途徑結合沙特國家差異引用IEC 61000系列行為指標。進口商應確保測試配置、電源線長度、開關方式和控制電子部件均在文件中體現。

standards_or_laws: SASO technical regulations for electrotechnical products with EMC expectations
IEC 61000-series emissions/immunity test logic as used through relevant Saudi-accepted paths
SABER-linked conformity route requiring model and configuration consistency

summary.en: Chinese export files often include EMC reports from domestic testing routes aligned to local compliance expectations, but the scope, setup, and limit interpretation are optimized for Chinese domestic models and may not map automatically to Saudi filing requirements.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包含国内测试体系下的EMC报告，但测试范围、设置和限值解读通常为中国市场优化，可能不能自动映射到沙特报备要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包含中國本地測試體系下的EMC報告，但測試範圍、設置和限值解讀通常為中國市場優化，可能不能自動映射到沙特報備要求。

standards_or_laws: CNAS or other accredited domestic electrical test reports for EMC and surge behaviour in China
Domestic GB/T EMC route evidence used for Chinese market distribution

gap.en: Gap: Chinese EMC documents usually need Saudi context closure. Before shipment, the exporter and Saudi importer should confirm that IEC-based EMC limits are demonstrated for the exact Saudi-target model variants, especially when variable-speed drives, battery mode, or smart electronics are included.
gap.zh: 差距：中国EMC文件通常需要补齐沙特场景闭环。出货前，出口商与沙特进口商应确认所涉型号在沙特目标配置下已按IEC基准验证EMC指标，特别是含变频驱动、电池模式或智能电子模块的型号。
gap.zht: 差距：中國EMC文件通常需要補齊沙特場景閉環。出貨前，出口商與沙特進口商應確認所涉機型在沙特目標配置下已按IEC基准驗證EMC指標，特別是含變頻驅動、電池模式或智慧電子模組的機型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EMC is within the scoped technical-regulation category and can be checked by Saudi market surveillance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only as a domestic electricity-market requirement in China; not automatically sufficient for Saudi

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep EMC as a model-specific requirement in Saudi filing, and do not assume domestic EMC language can be reused unchanged for every controlled power-tool variant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请将EMC作为沙特备案中的型号特定要求处理，不要假设中国国内EMC文件可原样适用于所有受控机型。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請將EMC作為沙特報備中的機型特定要求處理，不要假設中國國內EMC文件可原樣適用於所有受控機型。
